description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden crate with a weathered, plank-style exterior, commonly used for storage or shipping in urban environments. The top surface features the word 'SUPPLY' stenciled in bold black letters, indicating its contents or purpose. Two sides of the box display a worn, black stenciled symbol resembling three vertical bars, possibly a caution or handling mark. One side has a yellow adhesive label with a barcode and some printed numbers, suggesting inventory tracking or shipment identification. The wood grain is visible throughout, with a rough, matte finish and some signs of wear and tear. The crate appears solid and robust, suitable for placement on the ground or in storage areas such as warehouses, garages, or loading docks.
description: A large, weathered wooden supply crate with stenciled markings, a barcode label, and a rough plank texture. It is robust and designed for storage or shipping in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the crate's wooden planks and a large, black stenciled symbol of three vertical bars.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the wood texture and a partial view of a barcode label on the lower left corner.
description_view_2: Opposite side to view 0, displaying the same black stenciled symbol, but with slightly different wear patterns.
description_view_3: Back view features the word 'SUPPLY' stenciled on top and a yellow barcode label on the upper right side.
